NOTICE OF MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77019389) FILED BY DEFENDANT BENJAMIN, KAREN , AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEES OF THE BENJAMIN FAMILY TRUST

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT KAREN BENJAMIN, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE'S, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILS TO MEET THE BURDEN FOR DISCRETIONARY RELIEF UNDER CCP 473(B). SHAPELL SOCAL RENTAL PROPERTIES, LLC V. CHICO'S FAS, INC. (2022) 85 CAL.APP.5TH 198 IS INAPPOSITE. SEE KELLY DECLARATION AND E-MAIL COMMUNICATIONS ATTACHED THERETO. REQUEST FOR CCP 128.7 SANCTIONS IS DENIED. NO SHOWING OF COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 128.7(C)(1). THE COURT NOTES THAT 5 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DEFENDANT FILED A DOCUMENT TITLED "MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT..." NOTWITHSTANDING ITS TITLE THE DOCUMENT APPEARS TO BE A REPLY (NOT A SEPARATE MOTION) AND IS CONSIDERED AS SUCH. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Motion For Relief From Default-Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KAREN BENJAMIN, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT

Appearances: Nicole Kelly of the Kelly Law Firm (415.552.0059) for plaintiff and opposing party; Dominic Signorotti of McKenna Brink Signorotti LLP (925.433.5448) for defendant and moving party.

This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: OFF CALENDAR. This motion is not accompanied by Notice of Motion and was filed on October 2, 2025, 5 court days before the hearing. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KAREN BENJAMIN, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE'S, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT

Appearances: Nicole Kelly of the Kelly Law Firm (415.552.0059) for plaintiff and opposing party; Dominic Signorotti of McKenna Brink Signorotti LLP (925.433.5448) for defendant and moving party.

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. Moving party fails to meet the burden for discretionary relief under CCP 473(b). Shapell Socal Rental Properties, LLC v. Chico's FAS, Inc. (2022) 85 Cal.App.5th 198 is inapposite. See Kelly Declaration and e-mail communications attached thereto. Request for CCP 128.7 sanctions is DENIED. No showing of compliance with CCP 128.7(c)(1). The Court notes that 5 court days before the hearing defendant filed a document titled "Motion for Relief from Default..." Notwithstanding its title the document appears to be a reply (not a separate motion) and is considered as such. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MICHELLE HORNEFF-COHEN, HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S VERIFIED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' Demurrer to Amended Complaint is sustained with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action against the moving defendants. Incomplete and conclusory allegations are not sufficient. The Court notes that the moving party AGAIN noticed their motions in the wrong department. The Court further notes that Plaintiff again filed their opposition late. In the future if parties continue to ignore the local rules, rules of court and code of civil procedure, the motions will be ordered off calendar or treated as unopposed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
